'''Bular''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[council]]man who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ahakista/Legends|Ahakista]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] for failing to destroy [[Dunlan]]'s forces.

{{Char-stub}}
